name: schedule
description: >- Manages recurring and one-off scheduled tasks. Session-scoped scheduling via CronCreate/CronDelete/CronList. Documents the cloud path for tasks that need to survive machine sleep or network drops.
author: SethGammon
summary_zh: 这是一个管理定时任务的工具，能处理周期或一次性任务，特别适合设备休眠或断网后任务仍需在云端继续执行的可靠调度场景。
